ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Tool_Log_Depth__c)), OR( ISBLANK(Conversation_Depth__c), Tool_Log_Depth__c > Conversation_Depth__c, Tool_Log_Depth__c < 0, Conversation_Depth__c < 0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Tool Log Depth must be a non-negative value and cannot exceed Conversation Depth.
